creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
I haven't tested your patch but anything that fixes the broken crud in the existing port so I don't have to re-fix it every time a new PostgreSQL release causes the master port to get bumped, I will be extremely pleased as it will significantly reduce the diffs I have to carry vs. the stock ports tree.

Maybe we can finally get some movement on this? I think five years is more than long enough to declare a maintainer timeout.
